records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Philosophized (f*ls"*fīzd); p. pr. & vb. n. hilosophizing (f*ls"*fī`zng).]

defs: To reason like a philosopher; to search into the reason and nature of things; to investigate phenomena, and assign rational causes for their existence.
quotes: Man philosophizes as he lives. He may philosophize well or ill, but philosophize he must.
